name: critical-gate-vscode
description: VS Code diagnostics prototype for Critical Gate findings.

criticalGate.task.description: Task intent to pass to Critical Gate. When empty, the extension asks before running.

criticalGate.base.description: Optional git base ref or SHA for Critical Gate.

criticalGate.cliPath.description: Path to the built Critical Gate CLI, relative to the workspace root unless absolute.

criticalGate.refreshMode.description: Controls when Critical Gate refreshes diagnostics. Manual runs only from the command; onSave also runs after explicit file saves.

criticalGate.refreshDebounceMs.description: Debounce delay before running Critical Gate after a file save when refreshMode is onSave.
